goal_text:
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'saturday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 16:15'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for a train. The train should leave on saturday and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 16:15
Make sure you get travel time and price
